lines.raw: Lesson 83 | 第83课
Going on holiday | 去度假

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Where did Sam go for his holiday this year?
lines.chinese: 萨姆今年去哪里度假了？
lines.raw: Where did Sam go for his holiday this year? | 萨姆今年去哪里度假了？
Hello, Sam. | 你好，萨姆。
Come in. | 进来。
Hi, Sam. | 嗨，萨姆。
We're having lunch. | 我们正在吃午饭。

lines.english: Do you want to have lunch with us?
lines.chinese: 你想和我们一起吃午饭吗？
lines.raw: Do you want to have lunch with us? | 你想和我们一起吃午饭吗？
No, thank you, Tom. | 不用了，谢谢你，汤姆。
I've already had lunch. | 我已经吃过午饭了。

lines.english: I had lunch at half past twelve.
lines.raw: I had lunch at half past twelve. | 我十二点半吃午饭的。

lines.english: Have a cup of coffee then.
lines.raw: Have a cup of coffee then. | 那喝杯咖啡吧。

lines.english: I've just had a cup, thank you.
lines.raw: I've just had a cup, thank you. | 我刚喝了一杯，谢谢。

lines.english: I had one after my lunch.
lines.raw: I had one after my lunch. | 我午饭后喝的。

lines.english: Let's go into the living room, Carol.
lines.raw: Let's go into the living room, Carol. | 凯罗尔，我们去客厅吧。

lines.english: We can have our coffee there.
lines.chinese: 我们可以在那儿喝咖啡。
lines.raw: We can have our coffee there. | 我们可以在那儿喝咖啡。

lines.chinese: 萨姆，请原谅这儿有点乱。
lines.raw: Excuse the mess, Sam. | 萨姆，请原谅这儿有点乱。
This room's very untidy. | 这房间太不整洁了。
We're packing our suitcases. | 我们正在打包行李箱。
We're going to leave tomorrow. | 我们明天要走了。

lines.english: Tom and I are going to have a holiday.
lines.raw: Tom and I are going to have a holiday. | 汤姆和我要去度假了。
Aren't you lucky! | 你们真幸运！

lines.english: When are you going to have a holiday, Sam?
lines.chinese: 萨姆，你什么时候去度假？
lines.raw: When are you going to have a holiday, Sam? | 萨姆，你什么时候去度假？
I don't know. | 我不知道。

lines.english: I've already had my holiday this year.
lines.raw: I've already had my holiday this year. | 我今年已经度过假了。
Where did you go? | 你去哪儿了？
I stayed at home! | 我待在家里！
